scientific_context.goal: Perform an exploratory Principal Component Analysis (PCA) on a synthetic NDDataset to identify the main variance directions.
scientific_context.analytical_strategy: Baseline-correct the data, then apply PCA and visualise scores and loadings.
data_assumptions: Dataset is a 2D NDDataset with observation × variable dimensions
Data contains meaningful variance after baseline removal
validation_criteria: Score and loading plots render successfully
limitations: Does not perform cross-validation or determine optimal number of components
Assumes linear structure; nonlinear patterns will not be captured

inputs.name: dataset
inputs.summary: Synthetic 2D NDDataset generated in-memory for testing

steps.rationale: Create a reproducible 2D test dataset for PCA exploration.
Remove baseline drift before variance analysis.
Visualise sample distribution in PC space.
Visualise variable contributions to each principal component.

outputs.name: pca_result
outputs.description: PCA result object containing scores, loadings, and explained variance
